titleStmt.title: SII 23.362: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 362. (A.R. No. 362 of 1907.) Āḍuturai, Papanasam Taluk, Tanjavur District Āpatsahāyēśvara temple—on the north wall of the central shrine Rājarāja I: year 9: 993-94 A.D.

summary.p: Some stones seem to be missing in the body of the record and the portion at the end is damaged. The inscription states that after bringing under cultivation some fallow lands by (order of) Pirāntakaṉ Mādēvaḍigaḷ alias Śembiyan-Mādēviyār the mother of Madurāntakadēva alias Śrī Uttama-Chōḷa they were gifted away to the temple to meet the expenses of maintaining a lamp during the night in the temple of the repairs and renovation to the temple and provision for the grant of a living to a musician of the temple by name Śāttaṉ Kūttaṉ alias Pattagaḷ-Pattaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirājarājakesaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 9Āvatu teṉ karait tiraimūrnāṭṭut tevatāṉam tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟai māhāde varkku maturān=takatevarāṉa śrī Uttamacoḻarait tiruvayiṟuvāytta Uṭaiyapirāṭṭiyār
pirāntakaṉ mātevaṭikaḷārāṉa cempiyaṉmāteviyār Ittevar nilattil cempiyaṉmātevi yeṉṉum tirunāmattāl tiruttuvicca ṉilam kiḻpāṟkellai kaṟkuḷattukku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai peru vaḻikku vaṭakku melpālkellai Ipputu
kkuppuṟattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Aruppuvāykkut teṟkum Ivvicaitta peruṉāṉ kellaiyuḷ Uḷppaṭṭa lam niman=tañ ceytapaṭi sandhiviḷakku nicatam Irāviṉukku Eṇṇai Ūḷākkuñ ceyta nilam Eṭṭumāvum putukkuppuṟattukku
tiṅkaḷ snamaṉam Ūrkeṇi mārum ceyta nilam ṅkalattaṭika ḷeṇṇūṟṟuvaṉukku cey nila m Amaracāttaṉ kūttaṉāṉa pattakaḷpattaṉukkut tiru vam pāṭac ceyta nilam 4 māvum maṇai yu toṭṭamu teṅku mivaṉukku nivantam Araṅkaṉ kuṉṟaṉāṉa
cāṉacivaṉum nilam Orumāvaraiyum kālu maṉaiyun toṭṭamunteṅkum kāḷamūta 1- kku nivan=tam Āccaṉ Eṭuppittatukkuc ceyta nilam kiḻpāṟ kellai kāḷappuṟattu meṟkkun teṉpāṟkellai
pāvāykkulaṅkuṅ kucavaṉtaṭṭukku kkum vaṭapāṟkellai puṟṟukku kāḷam Oṉṟu Ūtac ce
Digital edition of SII 23.362 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
